General.Name: Finance of America Companies Inc
General.Description: Finance of America Companies Inc. a financial service holding company, through its subsidiaries, provides home equity-based financing solutions for a modern retirement in the United States. The company operates through two segments: Retirement Solutions and Portfolio Management. It offers home equity conversion and non-agency reverse mortgage loans; and product development, loan securitization, loan sales, risk management, servicing oversight, and asset management services. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Plano, Texas.
General.Address: 5830 Granite Parkway, Plano, TX, United States, 75024
